title: Natural Bunion Remedies: 10 Best Herbal Creams for Relief
description: Aloe barbadensis cream is good for bunions because it has anti-inflammatory properties. This means it can help reduce the pain and swelling caused by the bunion. The cream also has soothing and moisturizing properties, which can help soften the skin and reduce friction. This can be especially helpful for people who wear shoes that put pressure on their toes and cause the bunion to become irritated. The cream can also help to protect the skin from further irritation and damage. Addition...
